series_metadata.series_title: Corp Non-Resident Individual Estimated Income Tax Voucher
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used to make estimated payments for non-resident individuals who filed a composite Income Tax Return (IT-1040M).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Original scanned in the ODT Info Image System then kept for 6 months unless not scanned do to age of return. It not scanned then original is kept 4 years. ; Electronic: A electronic record is kept for 10 years via the ODT Info Image System., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
